text:
- BUMP PORTREVISION
- Applied patch to fix the bug that causes it to crash on FreeBSD.
See http://bugzilla.gnome.org/show_bug.cgi?id=591206.

The log of build is in mine tinderbox:
http://www.scjamorim.org/Home/gnome-commander2-1.2.8_1,1.log

- files/patch-src-owner.cc

Port maintainer (scjamorim@bsd.com.br) is cc'd.
